message:
refactor(wizard): modernize VPS-related pages with design system

Apply consistent Terminal Noir styling to three VPS-related wizard
pages, aligning them with the design patterns established in other
wizard steps.

Common header pattern applied to all three pages:
- Icon container: rounded-xl with bg-primary/20 background
- Title: gradient text (foreground via muted-foreground)
- Time estimate badge below title (~5 min, ~1 min, etc.)
- Consistent spacing and typography scale

apps/web/app/wizard/create-vps/page.tsx:
- Add HardDrive icon import for header
- Replace Card with rounded-xl border styling
- ProviderGuide component: active state with primary/30 border
- Smoother expand/collapse transitions (duration-200)
- Import DetailsSection from AlertCard for expandable content

apps/web/app/wizard/reconnect-ubuntu/page.tsx:
- Add UserCheck icon import for header
- Replace Card with OKLCH-based success styling
- Success state uses oklch(0.72_0.19_145) green palette
- Code blocks use consistent rounded bg-muted styling
- Import AlertCard and OutputPreview components

apps/web/app/wizard/rent-vps/page.tsx:
- Add Cloud icon import for header
- Replace Card with rounded-xl border styling
- ProviderCard active state: primary/30 border, shadow-md
- Inactive hover: primary/20 border hint
- Provider avatar: bg-primary when expanded
- Checkmarks use OKLCH green instead of Tailwind green-500
- Recommended plan box: primary/20 border, primary/5 bg
- Import AlertCard component

Component import cleanup across all three:
- Remove Card import (no longer used)
- Add AlertCard and related component imports
- Add icons needed for new header design

These changes complete the wizard page modernization effort,
ensuring visual consistency throughout the 10-step user journey.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
